outlook.volatilityExpectation: High volatility: Dealer short gamma exposure amplifies downward momentum if support breaks.

outlook.summary: Spot at 6724.25 is ~100 points above the highest visible strike (6620), indicating strong bullish momentum with no overhead resistance visible. Volume activity concentrated in 6550-6615 zone provides pullback support levels. Monthly reverse-smirk skew and positive GEX confirm bullish structural positioning. Limited OI data restricts traditional wall identification.
